return(function(...)local H={"\076\102\090\104\118\112\049\061","\070\100\082\052\066\050\087\122\076\072\068\067","\056\083\069\089\097\065\061\061";"\057\048\082\116\105\057\054\079\108\103\097\112\066\103\083\061";"\072\081\070\073\087\108\071\061","\051\085\108\120\054\067\049\099\047\087\115\071\101\049\108\056\078\049\101\061","\051\085\088\074\070\072\106\084","\121\101\102\075\116\101\103\071";"\108\085\067\065\105\113\061\061","\081\085\054\122\101\049\108\067\108\104\061\061","\054\050\067\086\083\083\105\047\047\114\110\065\110\122\048\071\081\065\061\061","\105\073\067\084\105\113\061\061";"\089\047\104\103\080\068\099\082\117\090\061\061";"\049\049\089\079\068\083\115\069\047\065\061\061";"\054\097\086\052\076\073\108\085\101\073\056\100\072\103\082\105";"\071\051\068\057\089\120\097\120","\103\071\111\106\068\090\061\061","\113\048\049\104\055\047\079\051\116\101\067\089\056\113\061\061";"\068\074\051\072\071\105\086\086\077\071\101\061";"\113\048\079\111\070\114\105\120\054\122\067\088\076\050\087\085\054\090\061\061";"\047\117\111\101\099\113\061\061";"\076\057\088\079\076\057\115\099";"\066\072\097\098\066\090\061\061";"\112\113\108\106\111\117\053\090";"\070\047\115\086\078\087\088\087\087\057\098\079\087\085\098\098";"\117\087\112\057\069\067\074\119\073\086\101\066\107\077\105\043\121\113\111\122\084\067\108\102\083\098\111\082\098\098\052\112\115\104\048\043\118\070\068\054\070\066\120\117\118\087\052\083\097\090\079\047\057\088\047\111\079\079\119\053\076\087\105\048\084\074\080\073\112\079\047\047\081\057\048\101\110\072\122\055\079\121\066\047\077\098\099\118\081\109\049\080\049\115\066\083\078\054\097\075\111\077\109\061","\105\050\110\048\070\090\061\061","\110\114\054\103\083\085\108\087\101\073\067\081\110\114\088\069\066\065\061\061","\080\120\049\103\089\101\101\061";"\087\057\049\097\099\082\071\048";"\102\078\117\104\047\090\061\061";"\100\065\061\061","\076\047\105\122\078\072\116\098\076\048\115\069\078\083\110\089\054\072\090\061";"\056\049\100\101\052\050\ return(function(H,D,S,o,l,M,n,h,f,Y,v,V,m,c,T,r,i,W,E,q,K,N,B,A)q,c,m,V,N,f,i,Y,T,r,W,K,E,h,v,A,B=function(H)Y[H]=Y[H]-(366158+-366157)if-947949+(717148+230801)==Y[H]then Y[H],N[H]=nil,nil end o({},{[d((416880-(524988+-699683))+-602501)]=T,[d(-139642-(-128701))]=H;[d((-638697+632195)-4543)]=function()return-1524137-365466 end})end end,function(H,d)local D=W(d)local S=function(S,o,l,M)return e,SR,y,hR,U,j,f,XR,oR,O,b,QR,HR,R,qR,PR,k,a,aR,pR,z,OR,T,WR,ER,x,G,GR,VR,AR,J,xR,cR,NR,mR,u,jR,ZR,W,I,BR,kR,p,t,KR,vR,tR,YR,dR,F,Q,g,n,zR,Y,Z,iR,C,nR,MR,P,TR,L,rR,fR,X,DR,w,uR,lR,wR,s while E do if end,function(H,d)local D=W(d)local S=function(S,o,l,M,n)return E(H,{S;o;l;M,n},d,D)end return S end,function(H,d)local D=W(d)local S=function(S,o,l,M,n,N,Y)return E(H,{S,o;l;M;n,N;Y},d,D)end return S end,function(H,d)local D=W(d)local S=function()return E(H,{},d,D)end return S end return(c(1629459-(-958115),{}))(D(n))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[d(-290844-(-279836))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
